properties.property:
-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- #lStudios I-M -- Studio I - The Pit#b -- Studio J - Fastest Fingers#b -- Studio K - Fort Building#b -- Studio L - none#b -- Studio M - Maze LMS;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- #rStudios V-Z#b -- Studio V - none#b -- Studio W - none#b -- Studio X - none#b -- Studio Y - none#b -- Studio Z - none;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- #lStudios F-H#b -- Studio F - Musical Chairs#b -- Studio G - Ultimate Bush Duel#b -- Studio H - All-Star Deluxe;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- #lStudios A-E#b -- Studio A - Make Your Luck#b -- Studio B - Barrel Mayhem#b -- Studio C - Step Elimination#b -- Studio D - Graalian Squares#b -- Studio E - Sumo;

-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign")
-- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text, -- #rStudios S-U#b -- Studio S - Sparopoly#b -- Studio T - none#b -- Studio U - none;
